title: refine_line
description: Correct existing linework without recreating it. Stabilize removes jitter, smooth rounds rough paths, simplify reduces excess points, and straighten converts a stroke to a clean straight line.

element_id.description: Existing element or line ID to refine.

strength.description: Correction strength. Higher values move points more aggressively.

simplify_tolerance.description: Normalized tolerance for simplification and stabilization point reduction.

preserve_corners.description: Keep sharp angle changes while correcting line jitter.
